title: Presenting a findings-based recommendation — evidence, not opinion

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Flow from rubric scores through findings summary table → evidence anchor selection → three-part recommendation structure, showing how evidence (not opinion) drives each step
depth_signals: Core Concepts has 6 sub-sections covering distinct aspects of the recommendation process
Real-World Patterns section warranted with professional and academic examples
no multi-technology pipeline or cross-refs — not deep
topic is a capstone method, not a multi-system architecture
